  • Articles
  • Changelog

Get Paper IDs

Source: R/paper.R
paper_id.Rd

Get Paper IDs

Usage

paper_id(paper)

Arguments

paper

a paper or paperlist

Value

a vector of paper_ids

Examples

paper_id(psychsci)
#>   [1] "0956797613520608"  "0956797614522816"  "0956797614527830" 
#>   [4] "0956797614557697"  "0956797614560771"  "0956797614566469" 
#>   [7] "0956797615569001"  "0956797615569889"  "0956797615583071" 
#>  [10] "0956797615588467"  "0956797615603702"  "0956797615615584" 
#>  [13] "0956797615617779"  "0956797615620784"  "0956797615625973" 
#>  [16] "0956797616631990"  "0956797616634654"  "0956797616634665" 
#>  [19] "0956797616636631"  "0956797616647519"  "0956797616657319" 
#>  [22] "0956797616661199"  "0956797616663878"  "0956797616665351" 
#>  [25] "0956797616667447"  "0956797616669994"  "0956797616671327" 
#>  [28] "0956797616671712"  "0956797617692000"  "0956797617693326" 
#>  [31] "0956797617694867"  "0956797617702501"  "0956797617702699" 
#>  [34] "0956797617705391"  "0956797617705667"  "0956797617707270" 
#>  [37] "0956797617710785"  "0956797617714811"  "0956797617716922" 
#>  [40] "0956797617716929"  "0956797617724435"  "0956797617736886" 
#>  [43] "0956797617737129"  "0956797617739368"  "0956797617740685" 
#>  [46] "0956797617744542"  "0956797618755322"  "0956797618760197" 
#>  [49] "0956797618772822"  "0956797618773095"  "0956797618785899" 
#>  [52] "0956797618795679"  "0956797618796480"  "0956797618804501" 
#>  [55] "0956797618815482"  "0956797618815488"  "0956797618823540" 
#>  [58] "0956797619830326"  "0956797619830329"  "0956797619831964"
